meta.title: Lommel (Belgium) ↔ Uganda comparison matrix
meta.note: Cells marked verified cite bibliography source_ids. Empty cells = research gap.

rows.uganda: Lake Victoria littoral glass sands + construction sand (Lwera, etc.)

rows.lommel: Processed products tailored to glass/ceramics markets
rows.uganda: BGS sample coarse (125–500 µm); historical note: may need washing/sizing

rows.lommel: Integrated extraction → processing → glass/advanced manufacturing clusters
rows.uganda: Export/raw sand and imports of finished glass; Diimu sheet-glass project not commissioned

rows.lommel: Lommelse Sahara nature reserve; quarry lakes
rows.uganda: Wetland loss and open pits (Lwera); NEMA wetland permit suspension (reported)

rows.lommel: Kristal Solar Park 99.5 MW ground-mounted (Kristalpark III)
rows.uganda: No equivalent industrial PV cluster documented at glass-sand sites

rows.lommel: 7 MWp Floating PV, Sibelco De Schans (Mol/Dessel) — not Kristal
rows.uganda: Not deployed; policy option on closed pits only after EIA

rows.lommel: EU/Flemish environmental and quarry rehabilitation frameworks
rows.uganda: Mining and Minerals Act 2022: closure plans, progressive rehab, bonds/guarantees
GIS evidence of wetland fragmentation (Lwera); sediment HM studies (Port Bell)
